description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical lotion bottle with a smooth white body and a green pump dispenser at the top. The front of the bottle features the text 'Secretly Straight' in a modern, sans-serif font, running vertically along the side. The pump mechanism is a light green color and is slightly raised above the white cap, designed for easy dispensing. The back and sides of the bottle display dense blocks of fine print, likely containing product information and instructions. The overall design is minimalist, with no decorative graphics aside from the text. The bottle appears to be made of lightweight plastic and is sized for easy handling and portability.
description: A tall, white cylindrical lotion bottle with a green pump dispenser and minimalist text-based labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Secretly Straight' product name and the green pump dispenser clearly.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the pump's spout and partial product labeling, with less text visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by dense fine print, with the green pump top visible but no main branding.
description_view_3: Side-back view showing more fine print and the pump's spout from a different angle.
